answers: Marathon training: needs 16-20 weeks of preparation. Build a base of running 3-4 times per week first before starting a plan.
First marathon tips: don't start too fast, stick to your pace, fuel every 45 min, and enjoy the experience!
Training plan basics: 3-4 easy runs per week, one long run (increasing weekly), cross-training, and proper rest days.
Marathon nutrition: carb-load 2-3 days before, eat a familiar breakfast race day, and practice fueling during long training runs.
